{{Quote|Jedi Mace Windu leads his troops in an intense battle on the plains of Dantooine. The Separatist forces counter the offensive with an enormous seismic tank, devastating the clone troops. Mace Windu finds himself alone and surrounded by the massive Droid Army -- without his lightsaber.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/12.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Twelve (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 12'''" is the twelfth episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, the second episode in [[Clone Wars: Season Two|Season Two]], and the twelfth episode in [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[March 29]], [[2004]].

==Plot summary==
On [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], a young boy named [[Paxi Sylo]] watches a [[Battle of Dantooine (Clone Wars)|battle]] unfold between [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces. [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] leads [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] against Separatist [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B-1]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. Although Windu is gaining the upper hand, the Separatists unveil their [[Seismic tank/Legends|seismic tank]], and activate it. A huge shock wave of dirt is generated, scattering Windu and his troops. When he finally picks himself up, he discovers that not only has he been separated from his soldiers and is alone in the midst of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] but he has lost his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].
